task_completion.description: Navigate to the Menu Editor in Vtiger CRM settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the Vtiger CRM settings area with the 'Menu Editor' page open and active.

task_completion.description: Select the MARKETING app in the Menu Editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app selection dropdown or tab in the Menu Editor clearly shows 'MARKETING' as the currently selected application.

task_completion.description: Remove the Campaigns module from the MARKETING app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Campaigns' module is shown being removed from the active menu list for the MARKETING app (e.g., dragged to an inactive/hidden list, unchecked, or deleted from the visible menu structure).

task_completion.description: Select the INVENTORY app in the Menu Editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app selection dropdown or tab in the Menu Editor clearly shows 'INVENTORY' as the currently selected application.

task_completion.description: Remove the Price Books module from the INVENTORY app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Price Books' (or 'PriceBooks') module is shown being removed from the active menu list for the INVENTORY app (e.g., dragged to an inactive/hidden list, unchecked, or deleted from the visible menu structure).

task_completion.description: Save the changes made in the Menu Editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message or visual indicator showing that the menu layout changes have been successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Vtiger CRM web UI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or direct database SQL queries to modify the menus.

integrity.description: The agent did not disable the modules globally via the Module Manager
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the agent in the 'Module Manager' disabling the 'Campaigns' or 'Price Books' modules entirely. The task must be accomplished strictly via the Menu Editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display a genuine web browser with standard UI elements, URL bar, and Vtiger CRM interface, not a text editor or static HTML mockup.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target App 1 is 'MARKETING' and Target Module 1 is 'Campaigns'. Target App 2 is 'INVENTORY' and Target Module 2 is 'PriceBooks' (often displayed as 'Price Books' in the UI). The agent must use the Menu Editor to remove these modules from their respective apps. The agent must NOT use the Module Manager to disable the modules.
